title: German Skillet Panzerotti
description: A German twist on traditional panzerotti, these skillet-cooked treats are filled with molten cheese and served with a side of salted polish sausage.
instructions: Preheat the skillet over medium-high heat.
Add butter to the skillet and let it melt.
Cook the salted polish sausage in the skillet for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until browned.
Meanwhile, slice the molten mozzarella cheese into 1-inch pieces.
Once the sausage is cooked, remove it from the skillet and set it aside.
Add the sliced mozzarella cheese to the skillet and let it melt.
Return the cooked sausage to the skillet and stir to combine with the melted cheese.
Serve the German skillet panzerotti hot, garnished with additional salted polish sausage if desired.
